# autarqui.co

Autárquico builds AI-powered tools for business autonomy.

## Products

### sigma
AI-assisted labor and tax advisory for freelancers, SMEs, and accounting firms.
- For businesses: https://autarqui.co/sigma/negocios
- For advisors: https://autarqui.co/sigma/asesorias

### delta
Conversational BI platform that turns business data into actionable insights.
https://autarqui.co/delta

- Delta: https://autarqui.co/delta
